goals.rationale: Since I've already put in the work (progress is at 1.0), submitting now secures the academic win with zero additional effort. This aligns with my need for closure; leaving it open until Wednesday just adds mental noise without changing the outcome. It's the most efficient way to end this loop and protect my peace of mind.
